title: product_components
description: Individual SKU catalog — one row per purchasable hardware item (slat, post, rail, bracket, hinge, spacer pack, etc.). SKUs embed colour/size when relevant (e.g. XP-6100-S65-B = 6100mm slat, 65mm wide, Black). Pricing lives in pricing_rules.

sku.description: Unique SKU within an organisation. Convention: colour-bearing SKUs end in the short colour code (e.g. -B, -MN, -WG).

category.description: Engine selector category the selector/companion system matches on. Examples: 'slat', 'side_frame', 'cfc_cover', 'centre_support_rail', 'f_section', 'accessory', 'mounting', 'gate_side_frame', 'joiner_block', 'hardware'. BOM presentation categories should be stored in metadata.bomCategory so selector categories remain stable.

subCategory.description: BOM presentation cluster within the rendered category, e.g. 'cover_strips', 'caps', 'slat_spacers'.

companionOf.description: SKU prefix or parent SKU that this item should render beneath in the BOM when the parent is present in the same scope.

sortPriority.description: BOM display sort priority. Lower values render first within a sub-category.

isOptionalAccessory.description: When true, this SKU must never be auto-added. It only appears when the user opts in.

optionalChildOf.description: Parent SKU values or parent aliases that can offer this SKU as an optional add-on.

qtyPerParent.description: Default optional add-on quantity per selected parent quantity.

qtyFormula.description: Optional math.js expression for add-on quantity when qtyPerParent is not enough.

default_price.description: Fallback per-unit price in AUD, used when no pricing_rules row matches. Usually mirrors the tier1 price.

system_types.description: Which fencing systems this SKU applies to. Must be a subset of ['QSHS','VS','XPL','BAYG','GATE'] per the DB CHECK constraint.
